---
title: "Data Analysis"
subtitle: "In-Class Exercise 1"
author: "Yu-You Liou"
date: today
institute: "Shih Chien University"
format:
  revealjs:
    html-math-method: katex
smaller: true
theme: serif
footer: "Elementary Statistics: A Step by Step Approach"
editor: source
slide-number: true
scrollable: false
transition: "none"
menu:
  useTextContentForMissingTitles: false
  hideMissingTitles: true
  side: 'left'
  titleSelector: 'h1'
---

## Question 1

Evaluate $1 + 1$ in R.

## Question 2

Evaluate $3 \times 4$ in R.
